ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., city, county, state) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the region was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_regions_parent_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_region_id") REFERENCES geographic_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset (e.g., population demographics, household types) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., government, private) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the dataset is active and available for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, policymaker) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_dataset" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id", "dataset_id")
)
